Metadata.title: VocaRank - The Definitive Vocaloid Ranking & Platform
Metadata.description: Discover the most popular Vocaloid songs. Explore real-time song rankings, deep analysis of voicebank stats, and build your own playlists.

Home.subtitle: Track the pulse of the Vocaloid community. Real-time rankings from YouTube and Niconico aggregated in one place.
Home.cta_signup: Create a free account — save favourites & track rankings
Home.preview_notice: This site is currently under active development — some features may be incomplete
Home.top_movers_loading: Rankings are being calculated. Check back soon!
Home.feature_ranking_desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly song rankings sorted by view gain across YouTube and Niconico.
Home.feature_search_desc: Find any Vocaloid song or artist across our entire database by name in English, Japanese, or Romaji.
Home.feature_statistics_desc: Explore engine market share, voicebank usage ratios, and production trends over time.
Home.feature_network_desc: Visualize collaboration graphs between producers and voicebanks in an interactive force graph.
Home.feature_player_desc: Listen to songs directly in the browser — build playlists and share them with friends.
Home.feature_favorites_desc: Save your favourite songs and artists to a personal collection. Sign in to get started.
Home.about_body:
VocaRank is a real-time Vocaloid song ranking and database platform. By updating view data from YouTube and Niconico on an hourly basis, we not only help you explore the latest trending Vocaloid music, but also comprehensively record its evolution and trends from the past to the present.

VocaRank is far more than just a simple ranking site. Leveraging the community-driven VocaDB database—featuring over 850,000 songs and 140,000 creators—we allow users to deeply explore Vocaloid music and its history. Alongside recent trending charts, the platform provides long-term data analysis, including changes in voicebank market share and cross-era interactive network graphs that visualize collaborations between creators.

With our thoughtfully designed built-in player, you can instantly listen to everything from historic masterpieces to the newest hits, as well as create and share your own exclusive playlists. It is a dedicated space for all Vocaloid fans to trace the culture's history, discover new trending music, and deeply explore the true charm of Vocaloid songs.
